creator: jlmales@gmail.com
text: I am new to FreeBSD and found the bug was assigned to virtualization@FreeBSD.org as I choose bhyve as "Component".  This is not a virtualization bug at all.  I am was just trying to select a "Component" for base system and not sources that some of the "Component" indicated as the "Component".  I am going to try "kern" for "Component" even tough I never built the FreeBSD kernel from source.  I just installed the stable FreeBSD Kernel thjat has not been updated since I installed FreeBSD mid July 2019.
